criteriaResults.evidence: cost-meter.ts: PRICE_TABLE (anthropic/openai/openai-compat DeepSeek+Grok/google, dated 2026-07 comment) + estimateCostUsd longest-prefix match. 14 tests: exact prefix, longer-prefix-wins (gpt-4.1 vs gpt-4.1-mini, grok-4 vs grok-4-fast), unknown -> undefined, claude-code -> undefined always, arithmetic derived from PRICE_TABLE, zero-usage -> 0.
claude-code.ts conditional-spreads parsed.total_cost_usd (typeof-guarded) as costUsd; no cost-meter import. 2 tests: passthrough === 0.0123, Object.hasOwn false when absent.

anthropic.ts computes costUsd once, spread into structured + normal returns. openai.ts adds protected costProvider (default 'openai'), spreads into refusal + normal returns. openai-compat.ts overrides costProvider='openai-compat' so DeepSeek/Grok price via compat rows. Tests prove openai has no deepseek row while compat estimate matches result.

budget.ts: BudgetOptions.maxUsd?, chargeUsd (non-finite/negative -> no-op), usdSpent, remainingUsd (Infinity uncapped), exceeded()/assertWithinBudget() extended, BudgetExceededError kind gains 'usd'. 6 new tests incl. NaN/negative/±Infinity -> 0 and source-compat check.
Full suite 298 files / 3731 tests green (3699 baseline + 32). grep confirms Budget still has zero production callers (Sprint-3-dormant per nonGoals).
build exit 0, typecheck exit 0, lint 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings in untouched eval-persist.test.ts).

filesChanged.description: Pure CostMeter: PriceRow/PriceTable, dated static PRICE_TABLE, estimateCostUsd longest-prefix, claude-code always undefined.
Conditional-spread total_cost_usd as costUsd; no cost-meter import (ADR-3).
estimateCostUsd wired into structured + normal returns.
protected costProvider discriminator + costUsd on refusal + normal returns.
3 tests: deepseek/grok priced via compat rows, unpriced local model omits key.
Additive USD axis; existing signatures preserved.

commits: c73b95d - bober(sprint-2): add optional maxUsd ceiling to Budget
d5c8b9d - bober(sprint-2): thread claude-code's real total_cost_usd into ChatResponse
73053c0 - bober(sprint-2): estimate costUsd in anthropic/openai/openai-compat adapters
notes: GoogleAdapter deliberately NOT wired (sc-2-3 scopes anthropic/openai/openai-compat only; google price rows present in table per sc-2-1, reserved for later). Deliberately NO broad catch-all rows (e.g. 'anthropic:claude') because 'claude-nonexistent-99' would falsely prefix-match — every key is a real model-family prefix from model-resolver.ts SHORTHAND_MAP, preserving fail-open. Budget has zero production callers; package.json/src/config untouched (all 4 nonGoals satisfied). Full suite 3731/3731.
